notes: Credits per 1M tokens as documented on the Codex pricing page. 'Input Tokens' maps to fresh_input_per_m (non-cached input). 'Cached input tokens' maps to cache_read_per_m. cache_write_per_m=0 because Codex/OpenAI caching is automatic with no explicit write-credit charge. GPT-5.4-mini credits: 18.75 input / 1.875 cached / 113 output (113 is the documented value, likely a rounding of 112.5).
